titles.title: It Was His Love for Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It was his love for me That nailed him to the tree To die in agony for all my sin. For my own guilt and blame The great Redeemer came, Willing to bear the shame Of all my sin.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, what a Saviour is mine, In him God’s mercies combine; His love can never decline, And he loves me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To Calvary’s hill one day The Lord was led away; None else the price could pay For all my sin. He on the cross was slain, Yielding his life in pain; He felt the bitter stain Of all my sin.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Was ever love so strong, Was ever crime so wrong, When Jesus suffered long For all my sin? He saw my greatest need, Became my Friend indeed, Through him I have been freed Of all my sin.
